description: 6sense is an AI revenue intelligence and ABM platform that surfaces in-market B2B buyers so sales and marketing can engage the right accounts at the right time.
tagline: ABM platform powered by revenue AI
overview: 6sense brings your data, channels, and teams onto one platform, reading buying signals to predict which accounts are in-market and when sales and marketing should reach out.
what_is: 6sense is a revenue intelligence platform that helps sales and marketing teams find and prioritize accounts that are actively researching a purchase. It analyzes intent and engagement signals across the web to estimate where each account sits in its buying journey, so teams can focus effort where it is most likely to convert.

It is built for go-to-market teams running account-based programs across both inbound and outbound. Common uses include prioritizing accounts for outreach, personalizing email and ads, and targeting competitor or look-alike accounts, with AI handling much of the research and timing.

6sense sits alongside your CRM, email, and enrichment tools as the intelligence layer rather than a replacement for them. It informs and automates campaigns with account-level data, but you still run messaging and pipeline management in your existing stack.
